summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GreenLink multi-profile agritech platform. Backend: 100% pass (24/24 tests). Frontend: Login/Registration working, Dashboard navigation has auth timing bug causing redirects to homepage

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard redirects to homepage on direct URL navigation due to AuthContext loading state not being checked in useEffect

integration_issues.issue: Navigating to /farmer/dashboard, /buyer/dashboard, /rse/dashboard, /supplier/dashboard redirects to homepage because the useEffect checks (!user) before AuthContext finishes loading from localStorage

action_items: HIGH: Fix dashboard auth check - Add 'loading' state check in all dashboard useEffects. Change: `if (loading) return; if (!user || user.user_type !== 'xxx') navigate('/');` in FarmerDashboard.jsx, BuyerDashboard.jsx, RSEDashboard.jsx, SupplierDashboard.jsx
Add loading state destructuring from useAuth: `const { user, loading } = useAuth();`
Add loading to dependency array: `useEffect(() => {...}, [user, loading]);`
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard components don't wait for AuthContext loading state - causes immediate redirect on page refresh
Missing loading check pattern: All 4 dashboard pages (farmer, buyer, rse, supplier) have same bug at line ~28-31

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Login/Register work, Dashboards redirect due to auth timing bug

seed_data_creation: Test users were pre-created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Frontend login/registration working. USSD simulator working. Dashboard pages have auth timing bug - they check (!user) in useEffect before loading finishes, causing redirect to homepage. Fix required in FarmerDashboard.jsx (line 28-31), BuyerDashboard.jsx, RSEDashboard.jsx, SupplierDashboard.jsx

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Dashboard components check `if (!user || user.user_type !== 'xxx')` in useEffect without checking if AuthContext has finished loading from localStorage. On page refresh, loading=true initially, user=null, so condition triggers immediate redirect to '/'
reproduction_steps: 3. Page redirects to homepage instead of showing dashboard
mitigation_steps: Add 'loading' to useAuth destructuring: `const { user, loading } = useAuth();`
Add loading check at start of useEffect: `if (loading) return;`
Add 'loading' to useEffect dependency array: `[user, loading]`

backend.auth_register_4_types: PASS - All 4 user types can register (producteur, acheteur, entreprise_rse, fournisseur)
backend.auth_login_email: PASS - Login works with email for all types
backend.auth_login_phone: PASS - Login works with phone number
backend.cross_profile_restrictions: PASS - Users cannot access other profile APIs

frontend.homepage: PASS - Loads correctly with GreenLink branding
frontend.login_page: PASS - Form works, redirects to /profile after login
frontend.register_page: PASS - All 4 user types selectable, registration works
frontend.profile_page: PASS - Shows user info with correct type badge
frontend.ussd_simulator: PASS - Phone UI simulator works with menu navigation
frontend.farmer_dashboard: FAIL - Redirects to homepage (auth timing bug)
frontend.buyer_dashboard: FAIL - Redirects to homepage (auth timing bug)
frontend.rse_dashboard: FAIL - Redirects to homepage (auth timing bug)
frontend.supplier_dashboard: FAIL - Redirects to homepage (auth timing bug)

mocked_apis_confirmed: Orange Money payment simulation (not real integration)
USSD is web simulator (not real telecom integration)
